match.disclaimer_1: 1. This report is automatically generated by MatchFlow AI and is for entertainment and reference purposes only.
match.disclaimer_2: 2. All analyses, predictions, and data interpretations in this report are based on historical data and algorithmic models and do not represent deterministic results.
match.disclaimer_3: 3. MatchFlow does not provide any form of gambling or investment advice. Users shall bear the risks of any decisions made based on this report.
match.disclaimer_4: 4. Football matches are full of uncertainties, and AI models cannot predict all sudden situations (such as last-minute injuries, red cards, etc.).
match.disclaimer_5: 5. Please view the match results rationally and do not indulge in gambling.
match.share_text: Check out the analysis report for {{home}} vs {{away}}
match.export_modal_desc: Export only selected segments and final summary for a smaller, cleaner PDF.
match.export_include_animation: Include animation content for this segment (title/narration/key data)
match.export_validation: Select at least one segment or keep final summary enabled.
